project: 凡人修仙傳 第四季 — 角色外觀 Reference
source: 《凡人修仙傳 第四季》第1至52話 (bilibili / 原力動畫)
style: High-quality 3D Chinese donghua, realistic semi-stylized rendering, cinematic lighting
notes: All characters rendered in photorealistic 3D CG style with Chinese xianxia aesthetic

appearance.face: Sharp handsome features, angular jawline, straight nose bridge, calm/stoic expression, dark brown eyes, thin eyebrows
appearance.hair: Long dark brown/black hair, partially tied up in a traditional topknot bun with a small ornamental hairpin, rest flows past shoulders

outfits.common_robe: Dark teal/green outer robe over light green or cream inner garment, layered traditional hanfu-style cultivation robes
outfits.battle_armor: Dark ornate armor with gold/bronze scroll patterns and metallic accents, more militaristic
outfits.travel_cloak: Grey/white robes with dark scarf/high collar wrap, practical travel outfit

signature_items: Carries a white rabbit with blue eyes (靈寵)
韓立_HanLi.veo_prompt_snippet: A young Chinese man with sharp handsome features, long dark brown hair tied in a half-up topknot bun, wearing layered teal-green traditional cultivation robes over cream inner garment. Calm stoic expression, pale complexion. 3D CG donghua style, photorealistic rendering.

appearance.face: Beautiful, elegant features, almond-shaped eyes, gentle expression, subtle smile
appearance.hair: Long dark hair with decorative hairpins/accessories, sometimes in an elaborate updo

outfits.purple_dress: Flowing lavender/purple traditional dress with sheer layers, elegant and ethereal
outfits.battle_outfit: Dark blue-purple fitted outfit with white/silver accents, belt with ornamental pieces, more combat-ready
outfits.winter_outfit: Orange-red outer garment with brown fur collar/trim, warm tones

南宮婉_NangongWan.veo_prompt_snippet: A beautiful Chinese woman with elegant features, long dark hair with ornamental hairpins, wearing a flowing purple traditional dress with sheer layers. Gentle graceful expression, porcelain skin. 3D CG donghua style, photorealistic rendering.

appearance.face: Rugged, strong jawline, short facial hair/stubble, intense expression
appearance.hair: Dark hair tied in a high topknot, shaved/short sides

outfits.armor: Brown leather and fur-trimmed vest/armor over bare chest, metal arm guards, barbarian-warrior aesthetic

壯漢角色_MuscularMan.veo_prompt_snippet: A muscular Chinese warrior with rugged features, dark hair in a high topknot, wearing brown leather armor with fur trim over bare chest. Imposing build, tanned skin. 3D CG donghua style.

appearance.hair: Long black hair in an elaborate topknot with ornamental crown/hairpiece

outfits.white_robe: Pristine white flowing robes with subtle silver/blue embroidery, carries a sword on back, celestial cultivator aesthetic

白衣劍修_WhiteRobeSwordsman.veo_prompt_snippet: A tall refined Chinese cultivator with aristocratic features, long black hair with ornamental crown hairpiece, wearing pristine white flowing robes with silver embroidery, sword on back. 3D CG donghua style.

appearance.face: Bald head, strong features, serene expression

outfits.monk_robe: Orange/saffron Buddhist monk robes, carrying a large ornate shield/artifact on back

僧人_Monk.veo_prompt_snippet: A bald Chinese Buddhist monk with strong serene features, wearing orange saffron robes, carrying an ornate artifact on back. 3D CG donghua style.

appearance.face: Elderly, long white/grey hair flowing freely, wise weathered features
appearance.hair: Long white-grey hair, loose, traditional elder cultivator look

outfits.elder_robe: Dark blue-grey traditional robes with subtle patterns, scholarly cultivator appearance

長老_Elder.veo_prompt_snippet: An elderly Chinese cultivator with long white-grey flowing hair, wise weathered features, wearing dark blue-grey traditional robes. 3D CG donghua style.

appearance.face: Handsome but cold/sharp features, piercing gaze, long straight dark hair flowing freely
appearance.hair: Very long straight black hair, no topknot, free-flowing

outfits.dark_armor: Dark red-bronze ornate armor with gold scrollwork patterns, imposing and regal, demonic/dark cultivator aesthetic

紅衣反派_RedAntagonist.veo_prompt_snippet: A handsome but cold-featured Chinese man with very long straight black hair flowing freely, wearing dark red-bronze ornate armor with gold scrollwork. Piercing intense gaze. 3D CG donghua style.

宋玉_SongYu.role: 重要配角 — 落雲宗白鳳峰峰主 / 白鳳仙

appearance.face: Heart-stoppingly beautiful, almond-shaped extraordinarily clear bright eyes, gentle warm smile, dark delicate eyebrows, serene and lovely bearing
appearance.hair: Long flowing dark hair with elegant ornamental hairpins, sometimes in a refined updo with dangling hair accessories

outfits.blue_robe: Flowing blue traditional cultivation robes with white/silver trim, elegant and refined, Luoyun Sect style
outfits.white_dress: Pure white flowing palace-style dress with pale blue sash, ethereal and celestial
outfits.travel_outfit: Light blue outer robe over white inner garment, practical but still graceful

signature_items: White pearl artifact (transforms into escape cloud)
Cultivation genius with Heavenly Spiritual Root (天靈根)
宋玉_SongYu.veo_prompt_snippet: A stunningly beautiful Chinese woman with extraordinarily clear bright eyes, long dark hair with elegant ornamental hairpins, wearing flowing blue traditional cultivation robes with white trim. Serene gentle expression, porcelain skin, graceful bearing. 3D CG donghua style, photorealistic rendering.

appearance.face: Attractive features, slightly anxious expression, loyal and devoted look
appearance.hair: Long dark hair in a simple but neat style, practical hairpins

outfits.cultivation_robe: Light purple/lavender traditional robes, modest and proper, Luoyun Sect disciple style

慕沛靈_MuPeiling.veo_prompt_snippet: A pretty Chinese woman with long dark hair in a neat style, wearing light purple traditional cultivation robes. Loyal devoted expression, fair complexion. 3D CG donghua style.

柳玉_LiuYu.role: 配角 — 韓立記名弟子

appearance.face: Sharp attractive features with a hint of former demonic sect cunning, thin lips, observant eyes
appearance.hair: Long dark hair, partially tied back, slightly wild

outfits.cultivation_robe: Dark green/teal robes with black accents, more martial in style, former demonic sect influence

signature_items: Six-Winged Frost Centipedes (六翼霜蚣) spirit insects
柳玉_LiuYu.veo_prompt_snippet: A tall attractive Chinese woman with sharp features and observant eyes, long dark hair partially tied back, wearing dark green cultivation robes with black accents. Slightly cunning expression. 3D CG donghua style.

第二元嬰_SecondNascentSoul.role: 反派 — 韓立失控的第二元嬰

appearance.face: Skull-like head with protruding fangs, terrifying demonic features BUT with Han Li's recognizable eyes
appearance.build: Imposing dark figure wreathed in black demonic qi

outfits.corpse_armor: Tattered dark robes merged with the Heavenly Fiend Corpse body, one arm gleaming gold-and-silver metallic

第二元嬰_SecondNascentSoul.veo_prompt_snippet: A terrifying demonic figure with a skull-like head, protruding fangs, and one gold-and-silver metallic arm, wreathed in swirling black demonic qi. Eyes eerily resemble Han Li's. Tattered dark robes. 3D CG donghua style, dark horror aesthetic.

world_aesthetic.style_description: Chinese xianxia fantasy world, 3D photorealistic CG animation by Original Force (原力動畫) for bilibili
world_aesthetic.lighting: Cinematic, volumetric fog/mist, dramatic color grading with cool blue-teal shadows and warm amber highlights
environments: Lush bamboo/flower gardens at night with lanterns
world_aesthetic.color_palette: Cool teal-blue dominant, warm amber accents, deep reds for antagonists/battle, purple for mystical/feminine, green for protagonist
world_aesthetic.vfx: Glowing magical auras, energy spheres, flying swords with light trails, spiritual qi particles, dragon spirits

best_reference_images.韓立_face_closeup: fanren_16.png — 35min mark, perfect frontal face closeup
best_reference_images.韓立_face_closeup_2: fanren_23.png — 13hr mark, another clean closeup in green robes

best_reference_images.南宮婉_purple: fanren_04.png — 30min mark, purple dress in cave
best_reference_images.ending_fireworks: fanren_13.png — 16hr mark, credits with all characters
